perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young girl sitting on the floor in a modern room, playing with patterned clothes. (2) An adult woman enters and joins the girl on the floor. Seeing the girl look bored, she brings out a stack of colorful children's books. (3) The pair sits together browsing through 'Where's Wally?' and various pop-up books. They demonstrate interactive features like sliding tabs and pop-up cities. (4) The woman holds up different book series to the camera, explaining their benefits while the girl looks on or interacts with the pages. (5) The video concludes with the woman and girl surrounded by books, gesturing towards the camera with a call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, cheerful background music with a steady rhythm starts immediately. (2) A woman's voice is heard speaking in an energetic, friendly tone, accompanied by the higher-pitched voice of the young girl. (3) A male narrator's voice enters, providing descriptive information about the books in a professional yet enthusiastic manner. (4) Sound effects (SFX) of pages flipping and mechanical book parts moving are audible during the demonstrations. (5) The music continues through to the end, fading out during the final sign-off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Hook text like '好玩又好看的書' (Fun and good-looking books) appears with star emojis to grab attention. (3) Specific book titles such as '《威力在哪裡》' and '《真相推推推》' are displayed in decorative banners. (4) Promotional text regarding '團購優惠' (Group buy discount) and price points like '滿3,999' appears towards the end in bright colors.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Promotional CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female and 1 female child are visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt and white skirt; a young girl with curly dark hair wearing a yellow t-shirt and light-colored skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor room with light wood flooring, white walls, and built-in light wood cabinetry and shelves filled with books and items.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional tool for a group-buy sale of educational children's books. It uses a relatable scenario of a parent/relative finding ways to entertain a bored child to demonstrate the engaging nature of the books. By highlighting specific interactive features like pop-ups and 'search and find' games, the content aims to convince viewers of the value and entertainment quality of the products to drive sales through the provided link.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker mentions a group-buy discount and directs users to a link in her profile to purchase the items shown.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends vlog-style domestic life with professional product marketing, targeting parents who are looking for high-quality educational materials.
